summary: Iteration 5 - Platform Credentials & Scheduled Posts Features. Full backend (23 tests) and frontend (Playwright) testing completed. All Platform Credentials APIs (GET configs, GET/POST credentials) working. All Scheduled Posts APIs (CRUD, publish-now, filtering, pagination) working. Frontend UI verified: Platforms page shows 'Credentials needed' badges and Configure dialog with Client ID/Secret inputs and Setup Instructions. CreatePost page has Schedule tab with date/time pickers and Scheduled Posts modal.

issues: Minor React warning: 'Collapsible is changing from uncontrolled to controlled'. This is a console warning only, no user impact.

feature_verification.platform_configs_api: PASS - GET /api/platforms/configs returns all 6 platforms (google, facebook, instagram, linkedin, x, tripadvisor) with auth_type, required_fields, instructions
feature_verification.platform_credentials_get: PASS - GET /api/platforms/credentials returns list with masked secrets (••••••••)
feature_verification.platform_credentials_post: PASS - POST /api/platforms/credentials saves credentials for valid platforms
feature_verification.platform_credentials_validation: PASS - POST with unknown platform returns 400
feature_verification.scheduled_posts_get: PASS - GET /api/scheduled-posts/ returns paginated posts list
feature_verification.scheduled_posts_create: PASS - POST /api/scheduled-posts/ creates scheduled post with future datetime
feature_verification.scheduled_posts_future_validation: PASS - POST with past datetime returns 400 'must be in the future'
feature_verification.scheduled_posts_content_validation: PASS - POST with empty content returns 400
feature_verification.scheduled_posts_platform_validation: PASS - POST with no platforms returns 400
feature_verification.scheduled_posts_delete: PASS - DELETE /api/scheduled-posts/{id} deletes post and returns 404 on GET
feature_verification.scheduled_posts_publish_now: PASS - POST /api/scheduled-posts/{id}/publish-now returns status and results
feature_verification.frontend_platforms_page: PASS - Shows 'Platform Connections' with 6 connected, 0 configured summary
feature_verification.frontend_credentials_badge: PASS - Each platform shows 'Credentials needed' badge
feature_verification.frontend_configure_dialog: PASS - Configure button opens dialog with Client ID/Secret inputs
feature_verification.frontend_setup_instructions: PASS - Dialog has expandable Setup Instructions with step-by-step guide
feature_verification.frontend_redirect_uri: PASS - Dialog shows OAuth redirect URI for developers
feature_verification.frontend_create_post_tabs: PASS - CreatePost page has 'Publish Now' and 'Schedule' tabs
feature_verification.frontend_schedule_pickers: PASS - Schedule tab shows Date and Time picker inputs
feature_verification.frontend_scheduled_posts_modal: PASS - 'Scheduled Posts' button opens modal with posts list

critical_code_review_comments: All tested APIs follow proper status codes (200, 400, 404) and validation
Credential masking works correctly - secrets shown as '••••••••' + last 4 chars
Future datetime validation in scheduled posts is robust
OAuth flow structure is in place but actual token exchange is MOCKED (doesn't call real Google/Facebook OAuth endpoints)
Platform connections show as 'Connected' because simulated connections exist in DB
Publish-now API simulates publishing and creates social_posts records but doesn't actually post to external APIs
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed scheduled posts and credentials

mocked_apis_list: OAuth token exchange - stores credentials but doesn't call Google/Facebook OAuth endpoints
Platform API calls for posting - publish-now creates social_posts records but doesn't post to external APIs

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 features fully tested: Platform Credentials management (GET configs, GET/POST credentials with masking), Scheduled Posts CRUD with future datetime validation. Frontend UI for both features verified working. All 6 platforms (Google, Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X, TripAdvisor) show as 'Connected' with 'Credentials needed' status. OAuth flow and actual posting are MOCKED - the system stores credentials and simulates connections but doesn't call real external APIs. Test file: test_iteration5_platforms_scheduler.py (23 tests). Minor React warning about Collapsible controlled/uncontrolled state in Configure dialog.
